description: Public-safe SETA website explanation snippets. Interpretation context only; not predictions or trade signals.

snippets.headline: AMZN: repair watch
snippets.one_liner: AMZN looks more like repair than all-clear; confirmation still matters.
snippets.public_note: AMZN looks more like repair than confirmation. The useful read is whether sponsorship is rebuilding underneath the surface.
snippets.short_explanation: AMZN is in a repair watch. The read is less about calling direction and more about whether sponsorship rebuilds enough to confirm the move. Structure reads as Permission without belief. Decision-pressure rank: 1. Skew: mixed. This is interpretation context, not a trade signal.
snippets.expanded_explanation: AMZN is in a repair watch. The read is less about calling direction and more about whether sponsorship rebuilds enough to confirm the move. Structure reads as Permission without belief. Decision-pressure rank: 1. Skew: mixed. This is interpretation context, not a trade signal. For the equity tape, the key test is whether leadership becomes coherent and broad enough to earn confirmation.
snippets.watch_condition: Watch whether sponsorship rebuilds enough to confirm the repair.
snippets.seta_read_line: repair watch | rank 1 | mixed skew | Permission without belief
snippets.regime_note: In the equity tape, this reads as repair. Structure reads as Permission without belief. Decision-pressure rank: 1. Resolution skew: mixed.
snippets.social_blurb: AMZN looks more like repair than all-clear; confirmation still matters. Context, not a signal.
snippets.risk_note: Interpretation context only; not a prediction or trade signal.

snippets.headline: XRP: participation is broadening
snippets.one_liner: XRP is showing broader participation, and the open question is whether that breadth can hold.
snippets.public_note: XRP is showing broader participation. That is constructive for the crypto tape, while the next test is whether the breadth can hold and earn confirmation.
snippets.short_explanation: XRP is showing participation diffusion, which means the conversation is broadening rather than staying trapped in one narrow pocket. The next test is whether that breadth can translate into participation and narrative coherence. Structure reads as Belief exceeds permission. Decision-pressure rank: 1. Skew: positive. This is interpretation context, not a trade signal.

The next test is whether that breadth can translate into participation and narrative coherence. Structure reads as Belief exceeds permission. Decision-pressure rank: 1. Skew: positive.
